message:
fix(repair,deps): add SymbolEquationArityMismatch error handling and update dependency graph

crates/ffs-repair/src/codec.rs:
- Add error arm for DecodeError::SymbolEquationArityMismatch that
  produces a formatted diagnostic with ESI, expected column count,
  and actual coefficient count — previously unhandled variant would
  have caused a match exhaustiveness error or silent failure

Cargo.toml:
- Pin libc to 0.2.180 (one patch back from 0.2.181) to resolve a
  pre-existing version conflict in the dependency tree

Cargo.lock:
- Add ahash 0.8.12 and arc-swap 1.8.2 dependencies
- Bump ftui ecosystem crates from 0.1.x to 0.2.0
- Update asupersync from 0.1.1 to 0.2.2
- Update getrandom 0.3.4 to 0.4.1, polling 2.8.0 to 3.11.0
- Add nix 0.31.1 alongside existing 0.29.0
- Standardize on bitflags 2.10.0 (remove 1.3.2)
- Remove obsolete windows-sys 0.48.0 targets

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
